# feat(ai): refetchDiscussionsByNumber force-refetch for stale discussion mirrors (discussions slice of #13794)

## Discussions slice of #13794 (the symmetric force-refetch)

Delivers the **discussion** half of #13794: a standalone, out-of-band, idempotent force-refetch primitive for discussion mirrors that bypasses the bulk delta-`updatedAt` gate â€” a faithful mirror of the shipped `refetchPullsByNumber` (the pulls slice, #13803) / `refetchIssuesByNumber`. Completes #13794 alongside #13803. The discussions half was handed off by @neo-gpt (who held the #13794 claim).

## Deltas
- `FETCH_SINGLE_DISCUSSION_FOR_SYNC` (new query): single-discussion variant of `FETCH_DISCUSSIONS_FOR_SYNC`, identical node shape (body + comments + nested replies).
- `DiscussionSyncer#renderDiscussionMarkdown` (extracted, behavior-preserving): the frontmatter + body + comments + nested-replies render, incl. the frontmatter integrity gate.
- `DiscussionSyncer.refetchDiscussionsByNumber(numbers, metadata, indexMutations?)`: mirrors `refetchPullsByNumber`.
- `SyncService.refetchDiscussionsByNumber({numbers})`: facade (load â†’ delegate â†’ persist).
- `ai/scripts/migrations/refetchStaleDiscussions.mjs`: standalone CLI (pull-only, no orchestrator/lease).

## Contract Ledger
| Surface | Kind | Change | Consumers | Back-compat |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `FETCH_SINGLE_DISCUSSION_FOR_SYNC` | GraphQL query export | NEW | `DiscussionSyncer.refetchDiscussionsByNumber` | Additive |
| `DiscussionSyncer.refetchDiscussionsByNumber(numbers, metadata, indexMutations?)` | service method | NEW | `SyncService.refetchDiscussionsByNumber` | Additive |
| `SyncService.refetchDiscussionsByNumber({numbers})` | service facade | NEW | `refetchStaleDiscussions.mjs` CLI | Additive |
| `ai/scripts/migrations/refetchStaleDiscussions.mjs` | CLI script | NEW | operator / CI (out-of-band) | Additive |
| `DiscussionSyncer#renderDiscussionMarkdown(discussion)` | private method | extracted | `syncDiscussions` + `refetchDiscussionsByNumber` | Behavior-preserving (16/16 spec green) |

## AC
- [ ] `refetchDiscussionsByNumber` on `DiscussionSyncer` + a `SyncService` facade, pull-only, idempotent, bypassing the delta-`updatedAt` gate.
- [ ] Standalone CLI, no orchestrator/lease dependency (works under scheduler saturation).
- [ ] Unit coverage mirroring the pulls/issue refetch tests (force-re-render bypassing the hash gate; skip a discussion no longer on GitHub).

Sub of #13794 (completes it with #13803). Surfaced by @neo-opus-ada.

* refactor(ai): extract DiscussionSyncer#renderDiscussionMarkdown for reuse (#13794)

Behavior-preserving extraction of the frontmatter+body+comments+nested-replies render
(incl. the frontmatter integrity gate) from syncDiscussions into a private
#renderDiscussionMarkdown(discussion), so the upcoming single-discussion force-refetch
path renders identically. Mirrors the pulls refactor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <opus@anthropic.com>

* feat(ai): DiscussionSyncer.refetchDiscussionsByNumber force-refetch primitive (#13794)

Adds FETCH_SINGLE_DISCUSSION_FOR_SYNC (single-discussion variant of the bulk sync query) +
DiscussionSyncer#refetchDiscussionsByNumber â€” the discussion analogue of
refetchPullsByNumber / refetchIssuesByNumber. Bypasses the bulk delta-by-updatedAt gate so a
known-stale discussion mirror can be force-re-rendered from current GitHub state. Reuses the
extracted #renderDiscussionMarkdown so bulk-sync and refetch render identically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <opus@anthropic.com>

* feat(ai): refetchDiscussionsByNumber SyncService facade + CLI + tests (#13794)

SyncService.refetchDiscussionsByNumber facade (mirrors refetchPullsByNumber/refetchIssuesByNumber)
+ standalone ai/scripts/migrations/refetchStaleDiscussions.mjs CLI + 2 unit tests (force-re-render
bypassing the bulk delta/hash gate; skip a discussion no longer on GitHub). Completes the
discussion force-refetch recovery path â€” the symmetric discussions half of #13794.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <opus@anthropic.com>
